reviews.comment:
Soy socio del ACA además de la carga de combustible hay cambios de aceite,filtros, gomeria, electricidad. Generalmente los encargados de áreas resuelven los problemas. También hay estaciomiento cubierto. Atención buena

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). Besides fuel, they also offer oil changes, filter replacements, tire repair, and electrical work. The staff in charge of each area usually resolve any issues. There's also covered parking. Good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNROWQzT0pBEAE
